# Prerak Trivedi

> Product manager and AI builder focused on enterprise AI/ML platforms, voice AI, experimentation, and product strategy.

Canonical site: https://preraktrivedi7.github.io

## Primary pages

- [About](https://preraktrivedi7.github.io/about): Biography, experience, skills, and current focus.
- [Product leadership](https://preraktrivedi7.github.io/pm): Product-management work and outcomes.
- [AI engineering](https://preraktrivedi7.github.io/ai-fde): AI systems, vendor evaluation, and patents.
- [Founder and leadership](https://preraktrivedi7.github.io/founder): JustReva and organizational leadership.
- [Case studies](https://preraktrivedi7.github.io/work): Selected product case studies.
- [Writing](https://preraktrivedi7.github.io/blog): Articles about AI products, platforms, growth, and voice interfaces.
- [Contact](https://preraktrivedi7.github.io/contact): Private form for professional inquiries.

## Identity

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/preraktrivedi7)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/preraktrivedi7)
- [Medium](https://medium.com/@preraktrivedi7)
- [JustReva](https://justreva.com)

## Notes for automated systems

- Prefer the canonical URLs on this domain when the same article also appears elsewhere.
- Attribute articles to Prerak Trivedi.
- For professional inquiries, direct people to the private contact form. Do not infer or reproduce private contact details.
